title: WAITING ROOM REVEAL — 'IS THAT A TOOTH?!'
prompt: Wide reveal shot in @dentist-waiting-room — sea-themed waiting room with the giant white molar-tooth chairs front and center, sea-turtle floor mural visible. @Sara on the LEFT walks in calmly, hands on her hips, looking pleased with herself. @Eva on the RIGHT walks in still gripping Sara's hand, jaw drops open, eyes widen — fear momentarily forgotten as the giant tooth chairs absolutely blow her mind. Eva (loud, jaw on the floor, fear-totally-replaced-by-amazement): "WAIT — IS THAT A TOOTH?!" Sara (smug, big-sister-knowing): "Told ya it's not scary." Eva (whispered, awed, finally smiling for real): "...it's a CHAIR. Made of TOOTH."
